findings.detail: Only foret_broceliande has GLB assets in Assets/bk_assets/. Other 7 biomes (landes_bruyere, cotes_sauvages, villages_celtes, cercles_pierres, marais_korrigans, collines_dolmens, iles_mystiques) have 0 files. All non-foret biome runs fall back to procedural geometry.

broceliande_forest_3d.gd:68-72 BUSH_MODELS hardcoded to rocks/ category. Real bush GLBs exist at Assets/bk_assets/bushes/foret_broceliande/ (6 files) but are NEVER loaded. Bushes spawned in game are actually rocks.

findings.check: No asset loading for unused categories: deadwood, groundcover, mushrooms
findings.detail: Assets/bk_assets/deadwood/, /groundcover/, /mushrooms/ all have foret_broceliande GLBs (6 each) but no spawning code references them. Rich environment categories go unused.
biome_walk_configs.gd:8 TILE_BASE = 'res://archive/3d_models/Tiles_Low_Poly/' — tiles are actually at Assets/Tiles/. Tile path resolution depends on forest_terrain_builder.gd appending this prefix.

findings.check: Non-existent tiles referenced for villages_celtes and cercles_pierres
findings.detail: biome_walk_configs.gd references Tile_38_Path_Grass, Tile_34_Trans_Grass_Dirt, Tile_39_Grass_Rocky — only Tile_01 to Tile_31 exist in Assets/Tiles/. These biomes will crash or use fallback tiles.

findings.check: BroceliandeForest3D biome_key export unused for asset selection
findings.detail: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:115 @export var biome_key. TREE_MODELS/BUSH_MODELS/BROC_ASSETS are all compile-time CONSTs hardcoded to foret_broceliande. biome_key only affects BiomeWalkConfigs (terrain colors, fog). No per-biome asset dictionary.

findings.check: prop assets in bk_assets/props/ never used
findings.detail: Assets/bk_assets/props/foret_broceliande/ has prop_bk_foret_broceliande_0000-0005.glb (6 files) + bridge variants. Only bridge_bk_foret_broceliande_0000.glb is in BROC_ASSETS. Other props unused.

findings.check: All BROC_ASSETS paths exist on disk
findings.detail: All 20 paths in BROC_ASSETS dictionary verified: structures 0-4, megaliths 0-4, vegetation 0-5, rocks 0-5, collectibles 0-5. All present.
forest_asset_spawner.gd has complete fallback chain: spawn_random_tree() → create_fallback_tree(), spawn_random_bush() → create_fallback_shrub(). Game won't crash if assets missing.
scenes/Run3D.tscn uses script res://scripts/run/run_3d_controller.gd. game_flow_controller.gd:45 SCENE_RUN correctly references it.

patterns_added: PAT-061: bk_assets categories (deadwood/groundcover/mushrooms) exist but lack spawning code — rich assets wasted
PAT-062: BUSH_MODELS const pointing to wrong asset category is a silent error since fallback rocks still render
